overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a walk through the desert town of Sandy Shores. The clip begins in a dusty residential area with NPCs and a dog, transitions along a hazy roadside with passing vehicles, and ends in the town center with clear weather views of the Medical Center and County Sheriff's office.

segments.scene_description: Walking through a dusty residential area in Sandy Shores, approaching two men and their dog standing by a chain-link fence next to a desert bungalow. The atmosphere is hazy with diffused morning light.

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the dusty roadside with the asphalt road on the right. A vintage sedan passes by as the residential buildings recede into the background, replaced by open desert scrubland.

segments.scene_description: The weather clears dramatically to reveal a bright blue sky and direct sunlight. Walking past palm trees toward the Sandy Shores Medical Center as a jeep drives by on the road.

segments.scene_description: Walking through the town center past the Sandy Shores Medical Center and approaching the County Sheriff's office. An American flag flies near the entrance as the camera continues down the sunlit main street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through Sandy Shores, transitioning from a hazy residential neighborhood into a bright, sun-drenched town center. It begins in a dusty residential area under diffused morning light, moving toward two men and their dog standing by a chain-link fence next to a desert bungalow. As the camera continues along the roadside, the residential buildings recede into open desert scrubland while a vintage sedan passes by on the asphalt. The atmosphere then clears dramatically into a bright blue sky with direct sunlight, shifting the view toward palm trees and the Sandy Shores Medical Center as a jeep drives past. Finally, the movement leads through the town center and past the Medical Center toward the County Sheriff's office, where an American flag flies over the sunlit main street.
